The '''H'drachi''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]], [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] sapients indigenous to the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[M'haeli/Legends|M'haeli]]. Somewhat resembling [[Camel/Legends|cameloids]], the H'drachi were highly in tune with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], with a high number of the species being [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]].

==Biology and appearance==
Diminutive, fur-covered [[Camel/Legends|cameloids]], the H'drachi were [[Mammal/Legends|mammals]] with short brown hair covering their bodies and had thin arms and legs. Shorter than the average [[Human/Legends|Human]], the H'drachi had a higher propensity for [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitivity]] than most species.<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>

==Society and culture==
[[File:Hdrachi-TynnansTEA.jpg|left|thumb|250 px|A H'drachi and two [[Tynnan/Legends|Tynnans]]]]
The native species to the world of M'haeli, the H'drachi were subservient to [[Human/Legends|Human]] colonist who usurped power and ruled the planet. Despite this, the H'drachi took comfort in their ability to read the future through an energy field they called the [[time-stream]]. This [[Force power/Legends|Force-perception]] of time was viewed as a form of [[Force vision/Legends|precognition]] by other Force-based organizations, but as most H'drachi were [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], the society developed its own traditions instead of adopting those of offworlders. The [[H'Drachi Seers]] were a group of highly attuned H'drachi who could manipulate the time-stream to see the future with extreme precision. The more H'drachi attempting to read the time-stream at once, the clearer the visions were. Some H'drachi took to wearing large turbans on their heads and dressing in colorful tunics.<ref name="TCSWE" />

==History==
Sharing their world with [[Human/Legends|Human]] colonists, the H'drachi did not rule their world, and therefore did not govern its place in galactic issues. Colonized during the [[Great Manifest Period/Legends|Great Manifest Period]], M'haeli was not involved in the many galactic conflicts which engulfed the [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] over the centuries, remaining under the control of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] since joining the ancient government.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a violent civil war between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], the H'drachi remained loyal to the Republic and were protected from the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]] by the [[Sixteenth Army|16th Sector Army]] of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]].<ref name="The Essential Guide to Warfare">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>

When the Republic was replaced by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] at the end of the Clone Wars, the Imperial governance occupied the world and oppressed the H'drachi. Despite their dislike of the Empire, the H'drachi believed that the time-stream had granted them a vision of the future without the Empire and so bid their time with patience. As the world's Humans rallied behind the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], the H'drachi continued to hold out hope that the storm of war would quickly pass their world. Notwithstanding successes on the part of the Human population, the world was subjugated once more by [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Lynch Hauser]]. By [[127 ABY]] the world was under the thrall of [[Darth Krayt]]'s [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Empire]].<ref name="TEA" />

==H'drachi in the galaxy==
A species of [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitives]], the H'drachi were not overly common among the galaxy's teeming population. During the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] that plagued the Republic in the decade preceding the Clone Wars, a H'drachi spiritualist and producer named [[Ch'been]] was active making highly rated [[Holodrama/Legends|holofilms]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="HNN49">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|49|life/13328_3.html|Baby Ludi Feature Slated for this Fall}}</ref>

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Boba Fett: The Fight to Survive]]'' to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].</ref> the H'drachi [[Gjon]] ran a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] repair and landing platform service as "Honest Gjon" on [[Bogg 4]], a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bogden/Legends|Bogden]], where [[Gender/Legends|he]] developed a reputation for dishonest dealings.<ref name="Boba">''[[Boba Fett: The Fight to Survive]]''</ref>
